summary: Fair‑quality audience tape of a horn‑filled show (9/21/73) with standout Casey Jones but an incomplete cut on the same tune.
review: The recording captures a rare horn‑enhanced performance from September 21, 1973 that many fans rave about, especially the energetic Casey Jones. However, one reviewer notes that the track is truncated halfway through the second chorus, indicating a noticeable flaw in the tape source.

ai_rating.rationale: Three enthusiastic 5‑star reviews praise the show and its horn section, while one 1‑star review highlights a serious recording fault; overall rating leans positive but technical issues keep confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Tape source shows a cut in the middle of the song, reducing continuity; otherwise listeners find the tape enjoyable and capture the horn section well.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on set structure; reviewers focus on the novelty of the horns and overall excitement of the 9/21/73 performance.
